operationResults.name: snapshot-policy-set-deferred
operationResults.message: Snapshot policy changes are deferred. EventStore does not yet have an approved runtime snapshot policy engine.

operationResults.name: snapshot-policy-delete-deferred
operationResults.message: Snapshot policy deletion is deferred. EventStore does not yet have an approved runtime snapshot policy engine.

operationResults.name: manual-snapshot-deferred
operationResults.message: Manual snapshot creation is deferred. EventStore does not yet have an approved snapshot job model for operator-triggered snapshots.

operationResults.name: compaction-deferred
operationResults.message: Compaction is deferred. EventStore write-once event keys require an approved non-destructive compaction model before this operation can run.

operationResults.name: backup-trigger-deferred
operationResults.message: Backup creation is deferred. EventStore does not yet have an approved backup engine and manifest model.

operationResults.name: backup-validate-deferred
operationResults.message: Backup validation is deferred. EventStore does not yet have an approved backup manifest and validation model.

operationResults.name: backup-restore-deferred
operationResults.message: Restore is deferred. EventStore needs an approved safe restore namespace, idempotency rule, tenant isolation rule, and audit model before this operation can run.

operationResults.name: export-stream-deferred
operationResults.errorMessage: Stream export is deferred. EventStore needs an approved bounded export contract, format, and event limit before this operation can run.

operationResults.name: import-stream-deferred
operationResults.message: Stream import is deferred. EventStore needs approved payload validation, idempotency, target namespace, and audit rules before this operation can run.

operationResults.name: tenant-mismatch-compaction
operationResults.problemDetail: Not authorized for the requested tenant.
